Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
fix: correct order bump identification and project cleanup

- Fixed Hubla webhook order bump detection using groupName field instead of ID patterns
- Order bumps now identified by empty groupName (vs main sales with filled groupName)  
- Improved association logic to find main sale by customer email and recency
- Removed 399 lines of temporary debugging files (check-*.js, test-*.js, etc)
- Consolidated duplicate webhook APIs (/api/webhooks/, /api/kiwify/webhook/, /api/test-metrics/)
- Removed experimental pages (cdr_hubla, hubla, back-redirect)
- Cleaned up console.log statements from production APIs
- Organized utility scripts into /scripts/ folder
- Dashboard should now correctly show 48 total items matching Hubla''s count

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

Bash(git commit -m "fix: temporarily disable VTurb integration to resolve dashboard timeout

- Disabled VTurb API calls that were causing function timeouts
- Dashboard will now load properly showing sales data from database
- VTurb plays data will show as 0 temporarily until integration is fixed
- This ensures core dashboard functionality works while we debug VTurb

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)

Bash(git commit -m "test: safely re-enable VTurb integration with fast timeouts and fallbacks

- Added 5-second timeouts to prevent function blocking
- Test only first player to minimize API calls  
- Comprehensive error handling with fallback to database
- Dashboard will work regardless of VTurb status
- Added detailed debug logging to identify issues

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>")

- Adicionado cálculo de métricas (plays, views, finished, retenção)
- Melhorado logging para debug da integração
- Mantido fallback para banco de dados caso VTurb falhe
